title: BOYS & GIRLS CLUB - 211info
text: BOYS & GIRLS CLUB OF WESTERN LANE COUNTY SIUSLAW ELEMENTARY SCHOOL BOYS & GIRLS CLUB Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a positive space for youth to engage in fun and empowering programs, such as leadership and community service, after-school programs, academic enrichment, workforce training, performing and visual arts, camps, and personal health and fitness. 2221 Oak Street Florence, OR 97439 Eligibility: Grades K-4 Hours: Monday-Friday 1:30pm-5:30pm Email (541) 999-2872 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 999-2872 Main phone Main phone (541) 999-2872 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: $25/year base membership fee $100/month for After-School Elementary program (grades K-4) Summer program pricing varies, call for more information. Financial assistance available. DOCUMENTS: All enrollments are online AREA SERVED: Cities of Florence and Mapleton SITE HOURS: After School Program: Monday-Friday 1:30pm-5:30pm Teacher In-Service Days: Monday-Friday 7:45am-5:30pm Summer Program: Monday-Friday 7:45am-5:30pm Services: Boys/Girls Clubs Camps Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - HEALTH AND FITNESS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
